title: The Fear of God Protects from Sin
reading:
Joseph resisted temptation because he feared God more than he feared losing favor with people. The fear of God creates internal boundaries when external accountability is absent.

A person who fears God asks: What does God think? Does this honor Him? Will this grieve His Spirit?

Sin loses much of its appeal when God's presence becomes our greatest awareness.
reflection:
What temptations do you face regularly?

How might a stronger awareness of God help?

Do you fear consequences more than God?
abide: Lord, let Your presence be more real to me than any temptation.
